description: A police department reports a stolen vehicle. An operator must check the city's license plate reader network for sightings.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'stolen vehicle' report with the vehicle's license plate number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives the license plate to search for.

nodes.task_description: Query the city-wide Automated License Plate Reader (ALPR) network for any matches in the last 24 hours.

expected_outcome.expected: The system returns a match, showing the vehicle passed a reader on 'Highway 3' one hour ago.

nodes.task_description: Relay the location and time of the last sighting to the requesting police department.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides actionable intelligence to law enforcement.
